segments.text: Going for the finish here, but the dodge beats it!
segments.original_text: ここで仕留めたい 回避を切らされた

segments.text: Nice! Applying inward momentum this time!
segments.original_text: うまい 今度は内側への慣性をかけて
おっと さすがにですね

full_text: Going for the finish here, but the dodge beats it! Nice! Applying inward momentum this time! Oh, that's some solid play!
